text.title: ADA Title II Compliance 2026 Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply ADA Title II Compliance 2026 end-to-end. Each step names its input, action, output, and (where relevant) a decision-gate.

step.name: inventory-services
step.action: Enumerate covered service areas (websites, apps, portals, kiosks).

step.name: classify-deadline-track
step.action: Pick 2026 or 2027 track per service area.

step.name: audit-against-wcag-21-aa
step.action: Run `a11y-testing` per service; produce conformance verdict per area.

step.name: document-exceptions
step.action: List exceptions per item; cite the §35.201 clause; date-stamp pre-effective-date items.
step.decision-gate: If any exception is blanket / categorical, STOP and itemise.

step.name: publish-and-link-remediation
step.action: Compile report; link remediation plan per non-pass area; validate with the script; archive with counsel.
